home.description: Where advanced aesthetics, modern skincare and personalised beauty come together.
home.descriptionBold: Discover a new expression of confidence.

welcome.description1: Novellah Restyle is a modern international beauty and skincare brand launched under the UAE-based Agroturf Group.
welcome.description2: Created with a vision to redefine the beauty experience, Novellah brings together advanced technology, professional expertise and personalised care in an elegant and welcoming environment.

whyChoose.subheading: At Novellah Restyle, we blend advanced science with personalized care to deliver exceptional, natural-looking results you can trust
whyChoose.feature1Desc: Our experienced doctors and specialists are highly trained and continuously updated with the latest global techniques
whyChoose.feature2Desc: We use of the art technology and internationally approved equipment for safe, effective and precise treatments
whyChoose.feature3Desc: Every treatment is customized to your unique skin, body and beauty goals for natural and lasting results
whyChoose.feature4Desc: Your safety is our priority. We follow strict hygiene protocols and international safety standards at every step
whyChoose.feature5Desc: From consultation to aftercare we ensure a premium comfortable and discreet experience in relaxing environment
whyChoose.feature6Desc: Thousands of happy client trust us for visible, long lasting and confidence boosting transformation
whyChoose.awardLabel: Best of Best award by Dubai, UAE / Srilanka

categoryTreatments.subheading: from advanced skincare to transform beauty solutions, explore our range of treatments designed to enhance your natural beauty

signatureTreatments.subheading: Expertly curated results driven treatments designed to enhance your natural beauty and boost your confidence
signatureTreatments.trust4Desc: Luxury Care in a relaxing environment

technologyMeetsBeauty.description1: At Novellah Restyle, modern technology and personalised care come together to create a new generation of beauty and skincare experiences.
technologyMeetsBeauty.description2: Every treatment is carefully selected and professionally delivered with a commitment to quality, comfort and client satisfaction.
technologyMeetsBeauty.point1Desc: FDA Approved devices ensuring the highest standards of safety
technologyMeetsBeauty.point2Desc: Advanced technology for precise results with maximum effectiveness
technologyMeetsBeauty.point3Desc: Our Treatments are designed to deliver visible results with minimal recovery time
technologyMeetsBeauty.point4Desc: Technology is powerful, but our experts make the difference

brandStory.philosophyBody: Our philosophy is to enhance individuality, inspire confidence and create meaningful experiences through professional care and modern beauty solutions.
brandStory.visionBodyPart1: To build Novellah Restyle into a recognized international beauty and skincare brand known for
brandStory.ceoQuote1: At Novellah Restyle, we are creating more than a beauty destination. We are building a modern international brand founded on innovation, professional care and the confidence of every client who chooses us.
brandStory.ceoQuote2: Our vision is to bring advanced beauty and skincare experiences closer to people while maintaining the highest standards of quality, trust and personalised service.
brandStory.ceoQuote3: Every Novellah location will represent our commitment to modern technology, continuous improvement and exceptional client care.
brandStory.bannerSubtext: Your journey to renewed beauty and confidence begins here.

doctors.subheading: Our team of highly qualified doctors and specialists are dedicated to delivering personalized treatments with precision, care and the latest technology

beforeAfter.subheading: Discover the visible transformation our clients love advanced treatments, Natural looking results

loyaltyPromo.subheading: our loyalty program is designed to thank you for trusting Novellah Restyle with your beauty journey
loyaltyPromo.step1Desc: Become a member of Novellah Rewards by contacting our team. It's easy and quick
loyaltyPromo.step2Desc: Indulge in our premium treatments. Every eligible spend brings you closer to greater rewards
loyaltyPromo.step3Desc: As your annual spending increases you'll unlock higher membership tiers and more benefits
loyaltyPromo.step4Desc: Enjoy exciting discounts complimentary services priority experiences and VIP Privileges
loyaltyPromo.bannerHeading: Have questions or want to know which tier is right for you
loyaltyPromo.bannerSubtext: Contact our team to start your membership journey

specialOffers.subheading: Indulge in our handpicked offers designed to help you look and feel your absolute best, For a limited time only

blogFeatured.subheading: Explore our featured expert article, carefully selected to help you understand advanced skincare treatments, modern beauty solutions, and professional tips for healthier, more radiant skin.

finalCta.subheading: Experienced expert care, advanced treatments and a personalized approach designed for you
finalCta.newsletterBody: Subscribe to receive expert skincare advice, beauty tips, treatment updates, exclusive offers, and the latest news from Novellah Restyle—all thoughtfully delivered to your inbox.
finalCta.newsletterDisclaimer: By subscribing, you agree to receive occasional emails from Novellah Restyle. You can unsubscribe at any time.
finalCta.address: Novellah, Al Wasl Road, Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
finalCta.welcomeNote: We can't wait to welcome you

aboutHero.subheading: At Novellah Restyle, we blend advanced medical expertise with a personalized approach to reveal the best version of you Because every detail matters and so do you

ourStory.quote: Our Purpose is simple to help you feel beautiful, empowered and confident in your own skin
ourStory.description1: Novellah Restyle was founded with a vision to create a luxury medical aesthetics clinic that goes beyond treatments delivering transformative experience.
ourStory.description2: We combine advanced medical expertise with an artistic approach to beauty. ensuring natural, elegant and long lasting results tailored uniquely for you
ourStory.feature1Desc: Certified Medical professionals with years of experience
ourStory.feature2Desc: Enhancing your natural beauty with subtle, refined results
ourStory.feature3Desc: Luxury Environment designed for your comfort and privacy
ourStory.feature4Desc: International Standards and strict safety protocols

clinicGallery.subheading: Every Space at Novellah Restyle is thoughtfully designed to offer comfort, elegance and an elevated experience

doctorsHero.point2Desc: Every treatments is tailored to your unique needs
doctorsHero.point3Desc: Your comfort, safety, and satisfaction are our top priorities
